scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@virtual-pub/api-gateway && npm run build --workspace=@virtual-pub/discord-bot && npm run build --workspace=@virtual-pub/embedded-activity-ui
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@virtual-pub/api-gateway && npm run typecheck --workspace=@virtual-pub/discord-bot && npm run typecheck --workspace=@virtual-pub/embedded-activity-ui
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev --workspace=@virtual-pub/api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=@virtual-pub/discord-bot" "npm run dev --workspace=@virtual-pub/embedded-activity-ui"
